title: System and method for chemical rinsing of a filtration system
abstract: The invention relates to a filtration system (10) for liquid, particularly raw water, comprising at least one filtration module (20) for filtering the liquid, a first inlet pipe (21) for feeding liquid to the filtration module (20), a second inlet pipe (22) for feeding liquid to the filtration module (20) and at least one outlet pipe (26) for discharging filtrate from the filtration module (20). A cleaning branch (80) is arranged between the first inlet pipe (21) and the second inlet pipe (22), and at least one dosing feeder (81, 82, 83) for adding a cleaning chemical is connected to the cleaning branch (80). The invention also relates to a method for chemical rinsing a filtration system (10) for liquid, particularly raw water, comprising at least one filtration module (20) for filtering the liquid, a first inlet pipe (21) for feeding liquid to the filtration module (20), a second inlet pipe (22) for feeding liquid to the filtration module (20) and at least one outlet pipe (26) for discharging filtrate from the filtration module (20). In chemically rinsing operation, a cleaning chemical is added via a dosing feeder (81, 82, 83) connected to a cleaning branch (80) which is arranged between the first inlet pipe (21) and the second inlet pipe (22).
claims: Claims Claims 1 . Filtration system (10) for liquid, particularly raw water, comprising at least one filtration module (20) for filtering the liquid, a first inlet pipe (21 ) for feeding liquid to the filtration module (20), a second inlet pipe (22) for feeding liquid to the filtration module (20) and at least one outlet pipe (26) for discharging filtrate from the filtration module (20), characterized in that a cleaning branch (80) is arranged between the first inlet pipe (21 ) and the second inlet pipe (22), and at least one dosing feeder (81 , 82, 83) for adding a cleaning chemical is connected to the cleaning branch (80). 2. Filtration system (10) according to claim 1 , characterized in that the cleaning branch (80) contains a circulation pump (84) arranged in series with the at least one dosing feeder (81 , 82, 83). 3. Filtration system (10) according to one of claims 1 to 2, characterized in that the cleaning branch (80) contains a cleaning valve (86) arranged in series with the at least one dosing feeder (81 , 82, 83). 4. Filtration system (10) according to one of claims 1 to 2, characterized in that the cleaning branch (80) contains at least a first dosing feeder (81 ) for adding an alkaline cleaning agent and a second dosing feeder (82) for adding an acid cleaning agent. 5. Filtration system (10) according to claim 4, characterized in that the cleaning branch (80) contains a third dosing feeder (83) for adding a chlorine cleaning agent. 6. Filtration system (10) according to one of claims 1 to 5, characterized in that a first concentrate valve (31 ) is arranged in the first inlet pipe (21 ) and a second concentrate valve (32) is arranged in the second inlet pipe (22). 7. Filtration system (10) according to claim 6, characterized in that the cleaning branch (80) is connected to the first inlet pipe (21 ) between the filtration module (20) and the first concentrate valve (31 ), and is connected to the second inlet pipe (22) between the filtration module (20) and the second concentrate valve (32). 8. Filtration system (10) according to one of claims 1 to 7, characterized in that a drain pipe (46) is connected to the inlet pipes (21 , 22), in particular via a collecting pipe (30). 9. Method for chemical rinsing a filtration system (10) for liquid, particularly raw water, comprising at least one filtration module (20) for filtering the liquid, a first inlet pipe (21 ) for feeding liquid to the filtration module (20), a second inlet pipe (22) for feeding liquid to the filtration module (20) and at least one outlet pipe (26) for discharging filtrate from the filtration module (20), characterized in that in chemically rinsing operation, a cleaning chemical is added via a dosing feeder (81 , 82, 83) connected to a cleaning branch (80) which is arranged between the first inlet pipe (21 ) and the second inlet pipe (22). 10. Method according to claim 9, characterized in that the cleaning chemical is circulated through the cleaning branch (80) and the filtration module (20) by means of a circulation pump (84) arranged in series with the dosing feeder (81 , 82, 83). 1 1 . Method according to one of claims 9 to 10, characterized in that a cleaning valve (86) arranged in series with the dosing feeder (81 , 82, 83) is opened to enable circulation of the cleaning chemical. 12. Method according to one of claims 9 to 1 1 , characterized in that an alkaline cleaning agent is added via a first dosing feeder (81 ) and an acid cleaning agent is added via a second dosing feeder (82), such that liquid in the filtration system (10) is adjusted to a neutral pH value. 13. Method according to one of claims 9 to 12, characterized in that a chlorine cleaning agent is added via a third dosing feeder (83). 14. Method according to one of claims 9 to 13, characterized in that a first concentrate valve (31 ) arranged in the first inlet pipe (21 ) and/or a second concentrate valve (32) arranged in the second inlet pipe (22) is closed before the cleaning chemical is added. 15. Method according to claim 14, characterized in that after chemically rinsing operation, the first concentrate valve (31 ) and/or the second concentrate valve (32) is opened, such that liquid containing a cleaning chemical is discharged through the first inlet pipe (21 ) and/or through the second inlet pipe (22).
